seoTitle: How to Add a Text Box Title Header in Power BI
metaDescription: Create a clean, professional title header in Power BI using a text box, with tips on sizing, positioning, and formatting for clearer reports.
intro: A clear title header helps viewers immediately understand what a Power BI report is showing, and a simple text box is often the easiest way to build one. This guide covers adding, resizing, and positioning a text box so your report headers look clean and consistent. It's a quick formatting win for anyone building reports meant to be shared with others.

steps.heading: Insert a text box onto your report
steps.body: Add a new text box to the top of your report page where you want the title header to appear.

steps.heading: Enter and format your header text
steps.body: Type the report title into the box and adjust the font, size, and weight so it reads clearly as a header rather than body text.

steps.heading: Resize the text box to fit your layout
steps.body: Adjust the width and height of the box so it spans the header area cleanly without overlapping other visuals.

steps.heading: Position it precisely on the page
steps.body: Align the text box at the top of the report and use alignment guides to keep it consistent with the rest of your layout.

steps.heading: Apply the same style across reports
steps.body: Reuse the same formatting choices on other report pages or files so your headers stay consistent across your reporting.

faq.question: Is a text box the best way to add a title to a Power BI report?
faq.answer: It's one of the simplest and most flexible options, giving you full control over font, size, and placement compared to some built-in title elements.

faq.question: Can I make the header dynamic based on filters?
faq.answer: A basic text box shows static text, though Power BI supports more advanced dynamic titles using measures if you need that functionality.

faq.question: How do I keep my header aligned the same way on every page?
faq.answer: Using the same size, position, and formatting settings on each page, or copying the text box between pages, keeps headers consistent.

faq.question: Can I add a logo alongside the text box header?
faq.answer: Yes, you can place an image visual next to or behind the text box to combine a logo with your title text.

faq.question: Will resizing the text box affect other visuals on the page?
faq.answer: No, resizing a text box only affects that element, though you may need to adjust nearby visuals so nothing overlaps.
